situation.translate: ситуация, положение, обстановка, состояние, место, местоположение, местность, служба

examples.eng: I explained the situation.
The overall situation is good.
The situation is very serious.
It was a very nervous situation.
I was unfamiliar with the situation.
examples.ru: Я был не в курсе происходящего.

examples.eng: a mistaken view of the situation
The situation was rather involved.
He's in a bad situation.
He was in full control of the situation.
I badly misread the situation.
How is your financial situation?
They got into a dodgy situation.
examples.ru: Они попали в довольно щекотливую ситуацию.

examples.eng: The situation is awful for all of us.
Look at every angle of the situation.
examples.ru: Рассмотрите эту ситуацию со всех точек зрения.

examples.eng: The situation demands immediate action.
I don't want to exacerbate the situation.
The situation called for strong measures.
The situation grew increasingly hopeless.
examples.ru: Положение становилось всё более и более безнадёжным.

examples.eng: What is your assessment of the situation?
The situation has improved in recent years.
Ellen seemed amused by the whole situation.
examples.ru: Эллен, казалось, всё это только забавляло.

examples.eng: The situation is, on the whole, satisfactory.
We recognized that the situation was hopeless.
examples.ru: Мы отдавали себе отчёт в безнадёжности положения.

examples.eng: He is trivializing the situation.
That's the size of the situation.
I think she misread the situation.
examples.ru: Я думаю, что она неправильно оценила ситуацию.

examples.eng: It was a very confusing situation.
The situation is extremely worrying.
We suppose that the situation will improve.
Could the situation get any worse?
examples.ru: Могло ли всё стать ещё хуже?
